info.description: API for managing veterinary clinic operations including appointments, medical records, treatments, and more.
info.title: Veterinary Management System API

get.description: Get a list of all recorded allergies

post.description: Record a new allergy for a pet

get.description: Get all allergies filtered by severity level

200.description: List of allergies with the specified severity

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific allergy

put.description: Update information for a specific allergy

delete.description: Remove an allergy record from the system

post.description: Mark an allergy as active again

get.description: Get all medical records
Get a medical record by ID

400.description: Invalid request format or validation errors

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific appointment

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token
Create a new user account with email and password

400.description: Invalid request format or validation errors
